meta.title: Resource Plane Postgres Schema with TimescaleDB

tasks.title: Create database init directory structure
acceptance_criteria: database/ directory exists with init/, timescaledb/, migrations/ subdirectories
tasks.description: Create the directory structure for all database scripts

tasks.title: Implement 00-create-databases.sh
acceptance_criteria: Creates dora_metrics, infisical, defectdojo databases
Creates least-privilege roles via psql
No environment variable injection for credentials
Idempotent (safe to re-run)
tasks.description: Create the idempotent database creation script using psql with DO $$ blocks

tasks.title: Implement 01-dora-schema.sql
acceptance_criteria: Creates event_queue table with all columns per design
Creates raw_events table with all columns per design
Creates dora_snapshots table with all columns per design
Creates archetype_history table with all columns per design
Creates wellbeing_surveys table with all columns per design
Creates vsi_stage_breakdown table with all columns per design
All tables use IF NOT EXISTS for idempotency
All indexes defined
tasks.description: Create the full DORA schema with all 6 tables, columns, types, and indexes

tasks.title: Implement 02-dora-roles.sql
acceptance_criteria: Creates dora_app role (not superuser)
Grants INSERT on event_queue
Grants SELECT, INSERT on raw_events
Grants SELECT, INSERT on dora_snapshots
Grants SELECT on archetype_history, wellbeing_surveys, vsi_stage_breakdown
NO schema ownership granted
Idempotent using DO $$ blocks
tasks.description: Create the least-privilege dora_app role with granular table-level grants

tasks.title: Implement hypertables.sql
acceptance_criteria: Converts raw_events to hypertable partitioned by recorded_at (1-day chunks)
Converts dora_snapshots to hypertable partitioned by recorded_at (7-day chunks)
Converts vsi_stage_breakdown to hypertable partitioned by recorded_at (1-day chunks)
Skips conversion if already a hypertable (idempotent)
tasks.description: Convert time-series tables to TimescaleDB hypertables with time-based partitioning

tasks.title: Implement 001-initial-schema.sql migration
acceptance_criteria: Creates _schema_migrations tracking table
Contains the full initial schema matching all init scripts combined
First run recorded as migration 001
Forward-only (no rollback)
tasks.description: Create the initial forward-only migration that matches all init scripts

tasks.title: Create docker-compose.dev.yml
acceptance_criteria: Uses timescale/timescaledb:latest-pg16 image
Mounts database/init/ to /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/
Mounts database/timescaledb/ scripts
Exposes port 5432
Named volume for data persistence
Uses .env file for credentials (gitignored)
tasks.description: Create a standalone docker-compose file for local TimescaleDB development

tasks.title: Add .gitignore entries for database
acceptance_criteria: .env file in .gitignore
pgdata volume directory (if any) in .gitignore
tasks.description: Ensure .env and local database files are gitignored

tasks.title: Implement test_schema.py with testcontainers
acceptance_criteria: Spins up test Postgres container using testcontainers with timescale/timescaledb:latest-pg16
Applies all init scripts in order (00, 01, 02, hypertables)
Verifies all 6 tables exist
Verifies 3 hypertables are properly created
Verifies dora_app role exists and is not superuser
Verifies role permissions are correct (INSERT/SELECT per table)
Cleans up container after test run
tasks.description: Integration test that validates the full schema against a real TimescaleDB container

tasks.title: Update Makefile with docker-compose targets
acceptance_criteria: Adds `make db-up` target to start TimescaleDB
Adds `make db-down` target to stop TimescaleDB
Adds `make db-reset` target to recreate database (down + up)
tasks.description: Add convenient Makefile targets for local database management
